details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 3-night Paris hotel under price with breakfast
Task 2: Save top WiFi+workspace hotel to favorites
Task 3: Start family booking and proceed to payment options
Task 4: Long-stay reservation and reach review page
Task 5: Same-day booking and select payment method
Task 6: Book three rooms and assign six guests
Task 7: Apply SAVE20 promo code within allowed total range
Task 8: Adjust dates/guests, filter and book closest-to-center hotel
Task 9: Map search and add pet-friendly hotel with parking to wishlist
